title: zinnia roezlii
intro: Zinnia roezlii, also known as Zinnia grandiflora, is a species of flowering plant in the daisy family native to Mexico. The plant is used in herbal medicine and is valued for its anti-inflammatory and antibacterial properties, which can help to soothe skin irritations and wounds. The health benefits of Zinnia roezlii include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate pain, and support the immune system. The plant can be prepared as a tea, tincture, or infusion for medicinal purposes, with the roots and leaves being used in herbal preparations.
